hook.summary: Introduction of the character Mejiro Dober with a shy, soft-spoken greeting.
hook.visual_action: A close-up of an anime girl's face with a bright light bloom effect, transitioning to her standing in a racing outfit.
hook.text_overlay: I'm Mejiro Dober. It's um... a pleasure.

scene_flow: Close-up character introduction with soft lighting and bloom effects.
Full-body reveal of the character in a green and white racing uniform against a sunset sky.
Static character profile card showing name, voice actor, and a motivational quote.
Final splash screen featuring the full game cast and the official logo.
on_screen_text: I'm Mejiro Dober. It's um... a pleasure.
I want to change! That's what keeps me running!
audience_proxy: Fans of anime-style character collection games and horse racing simulations.
